requirement_topic.en: Roskomnadzor Radio Frequency Permit and 5 GHz W52/W53 Indoor-Only Restriction (Short-Range Device Notification)
requirement_topic.zh: Roskomnadzor无线电频率许可及5GHz W52/W53室内限用要求（短程设备备案通知）
requirement_topic.zht: Roskomnadzor無線電頻率許可及5GHz W52/W53室內限用要求（短程設備備案通知）

summary.en: Roskomnadzor (Federal Service for Supervision of Communications, Information Technology and Mass Communications) regulates spectrum use in Russia and requires that radio devices — including consumer Wi-Fi and Bluetooth products — obtain a radio frequency interference (RFI) permit (razreshenie na ispolzovanie radiochastotnogo spektra) or complete a notification procedure before being placed on the Russian market. For mass-market consumer short-range devices (SRDs) operating on designated frequency bands (2.4 GHz ISM for Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, 5 GHz U-NII bands where permitted), Roskomnadzor issues generalised permits (obshchee razreshenie) covering specific SRD categories — individual device-level permits are not required for products that fall within the scope of these generalised permits. Devices operating in the 5 GHz band face stricter regulation: the W52 sub-band (5.15–5.25 GHz) and W53 sub-band (5.25–5.35 GHz) are restricted to indoor use only in Russia. Products incorporating these sub-bands must carry a clearly visible labelling statement restricting use to indoor environments. The W56 sub-band (5.47–5.725 GHz) may be available for indoor and outdoor use subject to Dynamic Frequency Selection (DFS) and Transmit Power Control (TPC) requirements. The State Radiocommunications Commission (GKRCh) under Roskomnadzor issues the relevant decisions on frequency allocation. Export to Russia of 5 GHz dual-band devices without the indoor-only labelling for W52/W53 risks customs detention and regulatory non-compliance.
summary.zh: Roskomnadzor（联邦通信、信息技术和大众传媒监督局）负责监管俄罗斯的频谱使用，要求包括消费类Wi-Fi和蓝牙产品在内的无线电设备在投放俄罗斯市场前获得无线电频率干扰（RFI）许可（разрешение на использование радиочастотного спектра）或完成备案通知程序。对于在指定频段运营的大众消费类短程设备（SRD）（Wi-Fi和蓝牙使用2.4GHz ISM频段，在许可情况下使用5GHz U-NII频段），Roskomnadzor颁发覆盖特定SRD类别的通用许可（общее разрешение）——属于这些通用许可范围内的产品无需单独设备级许可。在5GHz频段运营的设备受到更严格监管：W52子频段（5.15–5.25GHz）和W53子频段（5.25–5.35GHz）在俄罗斯仅限室内使用。包含上述子频段的产品须清晰标注限制为室内使用环境的标签声明。W56子频段（5.47–5.725GHz）在满足动态频率选择（DFS）和发射功率控制（TPC）要求的条件下，可能允许室内及室外使用。Roskomnadzor下属国家无线电通信委员会（GKRCh）颁发频率分配相关决定。含W52/W53的5GHz双频设备在未加贴室内限用标签的情况下出口俄罗斯，存在海关扣押及违反法规的风险。
summary.zht: Roskomnadzor（聯邦通信、信息技術和大眾傳媒監督局）負責監管俄羅斯的頻譜使用，要求包括消費類Wi-Fi和藍牙產品在內的無線電設備在投放俄羅斯市場前獲得無線電頻率干擾（RFI）許可（разрешение на использование радиочастотного спектра）或完成備案通知程序。對於在指定頻段運營的大眾消費類短程設備（SRD）（Wi-Fi和藍牙使用2.4GHz ISM頻段，在許可情況下使用5GHz U-NII頻段），Roskomnadzor頒發覆蓋特定SRD類別的通用許可（общее разрешение）——屬於這些通用許可範圍內的產品無需單獨設備級許可。在5GHz頻段運營的設備受到更嚴格監管：W52子頻段（5.15–5.25GHz）和W53子頻段（5.25–5.35GHz）在俄羅斯僅限室內使用。包含上述子頻段的產品須清晰標注限制為室內使用環境的標籤聲明。W56子頻段（5.47–5.725GHz）在滿足動態頻率選擇（DFS）和發射功率控制（TPC）要求的條件下，可能允許室內及室外使用。Roskomnadzor下屬國家無線電通信委員會（GKRCh）頒發頻率分配相關決定。含W52/W53的5GHz雙頻設備在未加貼室內限用標籤的情況下出口俄羅斯，存在海關扣押及違反法規的風險。

standards_or_laws: Federal Law No. 126-FZ of 07.07.2003 — On Communications (Zakon o svyazi), establishing Roskomnadzor's spectrum management authority
Resolution of the Government of the Russian Federation No. 1069 of 12.10.2004 — On criteria for classifying radio-electronic equipment and high-frequency devices as not subject to individual permits
GKRCh Decision on SRD generalised permit conditions — covering 2.4 GHz ISM and 5 GHz U-NII band use for mass-market consumer devices
TR EAEU 037/2016 — Sets out EAC technical requirements for radio apparatus including spectrum compliance documentation

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Committee, under MIIT) radio type approval for each radio module or finished product that uses radio frequencies. The SRRC approval confirms the device's operating frequency, channel width, and power output comply with Chinese frequency allocation rules. For 5 GHz devices, China's SRRC imposes similar sub-band restrictions: WLAN channels 36–48 (5.15–5.25 GHz) are indoor-only in China (analogous to Russia's W52 restriction). Chinese SRRC approval is valid only in China and is not recognised by Roskomnadzor or for the purposes of EAEU EAC conformity; a separate Roskomnadzor RFI permit / generalised permit compliance check is required for the Russian market.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备须向SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会，隶属MIIT）申请无线电型号核准，适用于每个使用无线电频率的无线电模块或整机产品。SRRC核准确认设备的工作频率、信道带宽和发射功率符合中国频率分配规则。对于5GHz设备，中国SRRC规定了类似的子频段限制：WLAN信道36–48（5.15–5.25GHz）在中国仅限室内使用（与俄罗斯W52限制类似）。中国SRRC核准仅在中国有效，Roskomnadzor不予承认，也不适用于EAEU EAC合规目的；进入俄罗斯市场须另行进行Roskomnadzor RFI许可/通用许可合规检查。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備須向SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會，隸屬MIIT）申請無線電型號核准，適用於每個使用無線電頻率的無線電模組或整機產品。SRRC核准確認設備的工作頻率、信道帶寬和發射功率符合中國頻率分配規則。對於5GHz設備，中國SRRC規定了類似的子頻段限制：WLAN信道36–48（5.15–5.25GHz）在中國僅限室內使用（與俄羅斯W52限制類似）。中國SRRC核准僅在中國有效，Roskomnadzor不予承認，也不適用於EAEU EAC合規目的；進入俄羅斯市場須另行進行Roskomnadzor RFI許可/通用許可合規檢查。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulation Committee (SRRC) under MIIT; required for all wireless devices operating in China
MIIT Notice on 5 GHz WLAN Frequency Use — indoor-only restriction for 5.15–5.25 GHz (Channels 36–48) in China

gap.en: Chinese SRRC type approval is China-specific and has no equivalence or mutual recognition with Roskomnadzor's RFI permit system. For mass-market consumer Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices, Russia's generalised permit framework typically covers standard 2.4 GHz ISM and 5 GHz W56-band operation without individual device permits — provided the device was assessed under TR EAEU 037/2016 and the EAC Declaration is in place. However, for 5 GHz dual-band devices including W52 (5.15–5.25 GHz) or W53 (5.25–5.35 GHz) operation, a critical labelling gap exists: the device packaging, user documentation, and device interface must explicitly state the indoor-use-only restriction in Russian. Failure to include this restriction label can result in customs refusal or product recall even where an EAC Declaration is otherwise in order. Devices that operate on 5 GHz channels beyond those covered by generalised permits may require individual Roskomnadzor frequency use permits — this scenario should be evaluated with a Russian regulatory specialist for the specific device frequency plan.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC型号核准仅在中国有效，与Roskomnadzor RFI许可体系之间不存在等同性或相互认可。对于大众消费类Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备，俄罗斯的通用许可框架通常涵盖标准2.4GHz ISM及5GHz W56频段运营，无需单独设备许可——前提是设备已依据TR EAEU 037/2016进行评估且EAC声明已就位。然而，对于包含W52（5.15–5.25GHz）或W53（5.25–5.35GHz）运营的5GHz双频设备，存在关键的标签差距：设备包装、用户文件及设备界面须以俄语明确声明室内限用限制。未包含此限制标签可能导致海关拒绝或产品召回，即便EAC声明在其他方面完全合规。在通用许可覆盖范围以外的5GHz信道运营的设备可能需要单独的Roskomnadzor频率使用许可——对于特定设备频率方案，应与俄罗斯监管专家进行评估。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC型號核准僅在中國有效，與Roskomnadzor RFI許可體系之間不存在等同性或相互認可。對於大眾消費類Wi-Fi和藍牙設備，俄羅斯的通用許可框架通常涵蓋標準2.4GHz ISM及5GHz W56頻段運營，無需單獨設備許可——前提是設備已依據TR EAEU 037/2016進行評估且EAC聲明已就位。然而，對於包含W52（5.15–5.25GHz）或W53（5.25–5.35GHz）運營的5GHz雙頻設備，存在關鍵的標籤差距：設備包裝、用戶文件及設備界面須以俄語明確聲明室內限用限制。未包含此限制標籤可能導致海關拒絕或產品召回，即便EAC聲明在其他方面完全合規。在通用許可覆蓋範圍以外的5GHz信道運營的設備可能需要單獨的Roskomnadzor頻率使用許可——對於特定設備頻率方案，應與俄羅斯監管專家進行評估。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Roskomnadzor generalised RFI permit compliance required for consumer Wi-Fi/Bluetooth devices on the Russian market; 5 GHz W52/W53 indoor-only restriction label mandatory for dual-band devices; individual frequency use permit may be required for non-SRD-category or non-standard frequency plans
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval required for all wireless devices operating in China; 5 GHz Ch.36–48 (5.15–5.25 GHz) indoor-only restriction applies in China (analogous W52 restriction)

source.publisher: Roskomnadzor — Federal Service for Supervision of Communications, Information Technology and Mass Communications

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Consumer Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices entering Russia must comply with Roskomnadzor's RFI generalised permit framework, assessed as part of TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC conformity. Chinese SRRC approval has no equivalence. Dual-band (5 GHz) devices incorporating W52 (5.15–5.25 GHz) or W53 (5.25–5.35 GHz) must carry a clearly visible indoor-use-only restriction label in Russian on the device, packaging, and user documentation — this labelling is a practical enforcement requirement and its absence can trigger customs rejection or market withdrawal. Verify current Roskomnadzor generalised permit scope and GKRCh frequency decisions with a Russian regulatory specialist before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入俄罗斯的消费类Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备须符合Roskomnadzor RFI通用许可框架，作为TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC合规的一部分进行评估。中国SRRC核准不具等同效力。含W52（5.15–5.25GHz）或W53（5.25–5.35GHz）的双频（5GHz）设备须在设备、包装及用户文件上以俄语清晰标注室内限用标签——此标签是实际执法要求，缺失可能触发海关拒绝或市场撤回。出货前请与俄罗斯监管专家核实现行Roskomnadzor通用许可范围及GKRCh频率决定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入俄羅斯的消費類Wi-Fi和藍牙設備須符合Roskomnadzor RFI通用許可框架，作為TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC合規的一部分進行評估。中國SRRC核准不具等同效力。含W52（5.15–5.25GHz）或W53（5.25–5.35GHz）的雙頻（5GHz）設備須在設備、包裝及用戶文件上以俄語清晰標注室內限用標籤——此標籤是實際執法要求，缺失可能觸發海關拒絕或市場撤回。出貨前請與俄羅斯監管專家核實現行Roskomnadzor通用許可範圍及GKRCh頻率決定。
